data.body: Epic effete-sanctified-sambar plan-review PASSED (blocking=0, advisory=10, signed attestation verified-at-sha 67372d018). Advisories are cross-child coordination notes, all honored by single-executor stack order: (1) 5274 deprecation warnings BEFORE 7c92/removal; (2) 44be sub-packaging LAST (after 090a extract + 6c4b git adapter); (3) c9a5 F14 fix stacked before 6c4b so 6c4b carries repo_root into git_adapter (no dead param); (4) e061 enumerate produce_code_review_verdict callers; (5) git_adapter placement chosen mindful of 44be boundary; (6) ensure apply_inbound.py ends <800 LOC after 090a+c244+6c4b net; (7) keep known-fine.md O4/DE4/O7 blessings accurate.
